name: UPBOUND GROUP, INC.
business: We are a technology and data-driven leader in accessible and inclusive financial solutions that address the evolving needs and aspirations of underserved consumers. Through our Acima and Rent-A-Center segments, we are a leading lease-to-own provider with operations in the United States, Puerto Rico and Mexico. On January 31, 2025, we completed the acquisition of Brigit, a holistic financial health technology company.
sellsTo: Consumers with limited access to traditional credit

exposures.sentence: Through our mobile and web application our Brigit segment offers various financial wellness products and tools to help users improve their financial health.

We provide a critical service for underserved consumers by providing them with access to, and the opportunity to obtain ownership of, high-quality, name brand durable products under a flexible lease-purchase agreement with no long-term debt obligation.
Through our Rent-A-Center segment, we provide a fully integrated customer experience through our e-commerce platform and brick and mortar presence.
The integration and use of AI and similar technology in our business presents risks and challenges that could adversely affect our business, reputation, and results of operations.

catalysts.sentence: The dividend was paid on January 6, 2026 to our common stockholders of record as of the close of business on December 17, 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Consumers in the subprime category (credit scores below 650) make up approximately 26% of the U.S. population.
tamClaims.sentence: According to data released by the Fair Isaac Corporation in September 2025, consumers in the subprime category (those with credit scores below 650) made up approximately 26% of the United States population.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 30% of U.S. consumers have incomes below $50,000 and may lack access to traditional credit.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 30% of U.S. consumers have incomes below $50,000 and may lack access to traditional credit.
